ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Discharged

Petition Of Judgment Creditor Unruh Law, P.C. For A Hearing On Third-Party Claim Of Emilie Green And For Order Setting Hearing Date
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jessica Taran, Esq. 917-686-0195 for Plaintiff.
Emilie Green, 415-694-9300 Third Party Claimant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Claimant says she has filed for legal separation, added ex-husband's name on account and the account was levied. The Court asks if property is Mr. Greens. Claimant is sworn and examined. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR UNRUH LAW, P.C.'S Hearing On Third-Party Claim Of Emilie Green And For Order Setting Hearing Date.

Granted. Any funds held by the Sheriff is to be returned to the Third party Claimant Emilie Green. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
